calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. ULmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Trinidad Sanchez was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Daniel Emanuel Sanchez, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.
Isabel Tam Li was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Dominic Francisco Sanchez.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
